<FrameLayout <<<<<<< HEAD android:id="@+id/btn_change_photo" android:layout_width="96dp" android:layout_height="96dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true">

<EditText android:id="@+id/et_email" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_input_field" android:enabled="false" android:fontFamily="sans-serif" android:hint="your@email.com" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" <<<<<<< HEAD android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textColorHint="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" ======= android:textColor="#99A1AF" android:textColorHint="#99A1AF" >>>>>>> 5ca5e1075dd70c549c30ca34e25cc36adec93a17 android:textSize="14sp" />
